name: Plain Muffins II
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the prepared flour and measure it.
2. Combine the egg, melted shortening, milk, and sugar in a bowl.
3. Add the sifted flour to the mixture and beat until smooth.
4. Fill the muffin tins 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 15-20 minutes.
6. Yield: 10 servings.
The Household Searchlight - 1941
